changelog:
THE ORACLE UPDATE (v7.0):
- [SYSTEM] The Oracle: Real-time Telegram Webhook integration. Receive instant radar alerts on your smartphone for critical station activities.
- [SECURITY] Login Sentinel: Immediate Telegram notification upon successful Commander logins or detected brute-force breach attempts.
- [P2P] Radar Alerts: Real-time notification pulse for incoming Laser Links (DMs), Handshake signals (New Followers), and tactical Sonar Pulses.
- [CORE] Integrated Telegram Engine: Lightweight, zero-dependency cURL messenger located in core/telegram.php.
- [DOCS] Added TELEGRAM.md: Comprehensive tactical guide for setting up the Telegram Bot courier.
